title: Berlin with Kids - Quick Summary
items: **Berlin with kids works best when you plan at child speed:** one main attraction, one food stop, one movement break and one optional extra.
**Best first picks:** Museum fur Naturkunde for dinosaurs, Zoo Berlin or Aquarium Berlin in the west, and parks/playgrounds between sightseeing blocks.
**Public transport is family-friendly:** children under 6 do not need a ticket; ages 6 to 14 use reduced fare.
**Stay central, Prenzlauer Berg, or Charlottenburg/Zoo** if you want easier days with fewer long transfers.
**Do not overpack Mondays, Sundays or public holidays.** Shops and museums can vary, so check official opening hours before promising a specific stop.
